entity_resolution.reason: Input is a chat summary containing durable architecture decisions and open questions about the Brain personal memory system; no existing entity identifiers were provided.

memory_cards.statement: Brain DB should be the source of truth for the Brain personal memory system.
Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection of the Brain DB.
Slack should be a strict memory intake agent for the Brain personal memory system.
It is unresolved whether Telegram should be added later to the Brain personal memory system.
It is unresolved which model is cheapest while saturating performance for the Brain personal memory system.

details: Extracted three architecture decisions as durable memory candidates.
Extracted two open questions without treating them as resolved facts.
No superseded or deleted facts were present in the input.
